patterns_recognized: Negative-edge GOLD rule (3/3 validated across 05-09 to 05-11): edge_pp < 0 on a GOLD pick = automatic DOWNGRADE. Applied today to NYY@BAL (-4.85pp) and STL@OAK (-6.15pp).

PLATINUM + model_prob > 0.85 + f5_full_delta > 0.20 = calibration artifact (0-for-2 history). SF@LAD triggers hard DOWNGRADE: f5_full_delta=0.2128, model_prob=0.8599, F3=9589 is almost certainly a pipeline artifact.

SEA@HOU OVERRIDE pattern validated 05-11 (Kirby dominated 3-1). Recurs today: F3=1796 vs 1783.5, fair_prob=0.340 (even lower than 05-11's 0.418), stacked flags, and HOU SP=Tatsuya Imai with likely thin Statcast history vs Bryan Woo (SEA).
Three-signal GOLD CONFIRM bar (F3>500, edge>4pp, f5_full_delta<0.15, no pipeline flags) validated 2-for-2 on 05-11. WSH@CIN cleanly meets all four criteria; sole actionable GOLD CONFIRM today.
Stacked pipeline flags (acute_roster + confidence_downgrade) reliably predict DOWNGRADE/OVERRIDE: validated on DET@KC 05-09, SEA@HOU 05-11, NYY@BAL 05-11. Applied to CHC@ATL and SEA@HOU today.

LAA @ CLE.reasoning: Walbert Ureña (LAA) vs Slade Cecconi (CLE). Edge +0.81pp correctly excluded by [4,15]pp band filter. CLE at 58.4% is directionally sound — CLE 22-21 hosts LAA 16-26, home advantage and SP quality favor CLE. However, bullpen_fatigue=True and confidence_downgrade=True flag real risks. SKIP tier handles both. Calibration bin 0.5-0.6 shows 47.75% historical win rate, so no model overconfidence concern here.

NYY @ BAL.reasoning: Hard DOWNGRADE: edge_pp=-4.85pp. Will Warren (NYY) vs Trevor Rogers (BAL). Market prices BAL at 57.4% — the market is MORE bullish on BAL than the model's NYY pick at 52.5%. Negative-edge GOLD rule is 3-for-3 validated (CHC@TEX 05-09 lost 0-6, NYY@MIL 05-09 lost 3-4, NYY@BAL 05-11 lost 2-3). bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade add confirmation. DOWNGRADE regardless of F2_xwoba_gap=0.027.

WSH @ CIN.reasoning: Miles Mikolas (WSH) vs Brady Singer (CIN). Three-signal GOLD bar cleanly met: F3=1046.4 (>500), edge=+10.51pp (>4pp), f5_full_delta=0.0881 (<0.15). No stacked flags; confidence_downgrade=False. CIN edges F5 at 56.6% (Singer's SP advantage) but WSH lineup quality carries the full game. fair_prob=0.417 is 0.3pp below the 0.42 floor — staking engine correctly withholds stake, but direction is valid.

COL @ PIT.reasoning: OVERRIDE to PIT. Paul Skenes (PIT, id=694973) confirmed on mound. fair_prob=0.241 — market prices COL at only 24%, the largest single-game market disagreement on the slate. f5_full_delta=0.2195: Skenes dominates F5 at 69.4%, yet model gives COL the full game — this is a calibration artifact, not a thesis. COL is 16-25 vs an elite Cy Young-caliber SP at home. Edge +28.48pp is a model misread, not genuine value. PIT direction clear.

PHI @ BOS.reasoning: Zack Wheeler (PHI) vs Jovani Morán (BOS, relief spot-start). Edge=-2.19pp: market prices BOS at 57.7%, slightly more bullish than model's PHI at 55.5%. Wheeler vs Morán is a quality mismatch favoring PHI in F5. However, the negative edge means the market already prices in this mismatch — and then some. SKIP is correct; directional confidence limited. confidence_downgrade=True adds caution.

TB @ TOR.reasoning: Shane McClanahan (TB) vs Patrick Corbin (TOR). Three-signal GOLD bar fails: edge=+0.22pp is below the 4pp minimum, meaning the market has fully priced McClanahan's advantage over Corbin. F3=1045.8 fires but cannot override the near-zero edge. confidence_downgrade=True adds a pipeline flag. Both conditions (edge <4pp AND flag present) mandate DOWNGRADE per the validated bar from 05-11.

DET @ NYM.reasoning: OVERRIDE to NYM. Freddy Peralta (NYM) confirmed; Jack Flaherty (DET). f5_full_delta=0.3285 — largest Stage 1/2 gap on the slate. NYM wins F5 at 80.9% via Peralta, yet model picks DET for the full game. That reversal requires DET's bullpen to dominate NYM's bullpen after Peralta exits — directly undermined by three stacked flags: acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade. Market has NYM at 58.9% vs model's DET at 51.9%. DET's comeback thesis is not credible.

CHC @ ATL.reasoning: Colin Rea (CHC, 27-14 team) vs Grant Holmes (ATL). Stacked flags rule: acute_roster=True + confidence_downgrade=True — validated DOWNGRADE trigger from DET@KC 05-09 and SEA@HOU 05-11. ATL at 64.1% is borderline heuristic-1 (home favorite >65%), and the market disagrees more than expected (ATL at 53.1% fair_prob vs 64.1% model). F3=780.7 is insufficient to override two stacked pipeline flags.

KC @ CHW.reasoning: Stephen Kolek (KC, id=663568) confirmed via API with 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date. PENDING designation is correct — without Kolek's SP quality score, no reliable directional basis exists. CHW has Erick Fedde (established veteran). Consistent with PENDING protocol validated on DET@KC 05-10 and NYY@MIL 05-10. No pick.

MIA @ MIN.reasoning: Eury Pérez (MIA) vs Bailey Ober (MIN). f5_full_delta=0.2118 exceeds 0.15 threshold: MIN wins F5 at 64.7% via Ober, yet model picks MIA for full game. MIA's comeback thesis via late-inning bullpen advantage is viable — no stress flags — but the Stage 1/2 gap alone warrants caution. SKIP tier is appropriate. Edge +6.7pp is within the band but the Stage 1/2 gap prevents GOLD consideration.

SD @ MIL.reasoning: Bradgley Rodriguez (SD) vs Brandon Sproat (MIL). Edge +0.57pp correctly excluded by band filter. MIL at 59.3% is directionally sound — Sproat home vs Rodriguez is competitive. However, bullpen_fatigue=True + confidence_downgrade=True both fire, directly undermining any late-inning MIL advantage thesis. SKIP tier already reflects this. No override warranted.

ARI @ TEX.reasoning: Zac Gallen (ARI) vs MacKenzie Gore (TEX). f5_full_delta=0.1831 exceeds 0.15: TEX wins F5 at 64.1% via Gore, but ARI picked for the full game. No active F-signals; signals column empty. ARI's comeback thesis (Gore exits, ARI bullpen dominates) is plausible with Gallen providing innings, but without confirming signals the direction is near coin-flip. SKIP correctly applied. ARI 20-20, TEX 19-22 — similar quality.

SEA @ HOU.reasoning: OVERRIDE to SEA. Near-identical structure to 05-11 validated OVERRIDE (F3=1796 vs 1783.5, same edge +31pp, same stacked flags). fair_prob=0.340 is LOWER than 05-11's 0.418 — market is even more bearish on HOU today. Bryan Woo (SEA, ~3.5 ERA quality) vs Tatsuya Imai (HOU, likely thin Statcast history given high API ID suggesting recent addition). HOU is struggling; George Kirby dominated this same HOU lineup 3-1 yesterday. All four OVERRIDE conditions confirmed.

STL @ OAK.reasoning: Andre Pallante (STL) vs Jeffrey Springs (OAK). Hard DOWNGRADE: edge_pp=-6.15pp. Market prices OAK at 59.5% — the market is more bullish on OAK than the model's 53.4%. F1_xera_gap=1.38* has an asterisk flagging small-sample SP data, making it unreliable. Negative-edge GOLD rule applies (3/3 validated). The staking engine already excludes via edge band, but DOWNGRADE confirms the brain-level view.

SF @ LAD.reasoning: Adrian Houser (SF) vs Yoshinobu Yamamoto (LAD). Hard DOWNGRADE rule triggered: PLATINUM + model_prob=0.8599 (>0.85) + f5_full_delta=0.2128 (>0.20) — this combination is 0-for-2 historically (ATL@LAD 05-10 lost 7-2, SF@LAD 05-11 SF won 9-3). F3=9589.3 is a pipeline artifact — no genuine baseball context produces a value 5x above prior extremes (~1800). F1* and F2 signals may be legitimate but cannot offset the PLATINUM calibration artifact. LAD direction defensible with Yamamoto; tier is not.
